member.name: M:BookingService.API.Controllers.BookingsController.Create(BookingService.Application.DTOs.CreateBookingRequest)
member.summary: Create a new booking for a vehicle.
member.param: Booking details including vehicle ID, dates, and price per day.

member.name: M:BookingService.API.Controllers.BookingsController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a booking by ID. Users can only see their own bookings.

member.name: M:BookingService.API.Controllers.BookingsController.GetMyBookings
member.summary: Get all bookings for the current user.

member.name: M:BookingService.API.Controllers.BookingsController.GetAll
member.summary: Get all bookings. Requires Admin role.
